title: Jinja 3.1.6 Environments, Layouts, Autoescape, and Contracts · Behavior Case: Template Contract
summary: Templates are constructed from author text, autoescape is assumed rather than configured, missing values render empty, safe filters spread, inheritance cycles hide layout ownership, and logic consumes arbitrary objects. Predict the reader decision, source identity, parse state, output URL, accessibility result, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the template contract increment in strict autoescaped layout and component system. Learners pr…
objectives: Pass a documented immutable view model instead of filesystem objects, services, secrets, or unrestricted application state.
Create one configured Jinja environment with bounded loader roots, explicit autoescape, StrictUndefined, deterministic globals, and version evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-static-site-python cumulative production static-site generator portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python parser, route, render, graph, and publication models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py,
Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production effects
require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class PublicationPolicy:
    base_path: str = "/handbook/"
    encoding: str = "utf-8"
    raw_html_allowed: bool = False
    max_document_bytes: int = 262_144
    max_nesting_depth: int = 64


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class BuildEvidence:
    revision: str
    content_manifest_digest: str
    route_manifest_digest: str
    artifact_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python static-site generator portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: ssg-template-contract — Pass a documented immutable view model instead of filesystem objects, services, secrets, or unrestricted application state.
# Evidence: ssg-worked-static-site-templates-jinja-5
# Competency: ssg-worked-static-site-templates-jinja-5.
# Case 9036: an offline-first field documentation build.
# Operating constraint: record the first failed invariant, repair, regression evidence, reader task, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner.
# Changed case: zoom a translated long-form page to 400 percent at mobile width with images and code blocks.
def worked_static_site_templates_jinja_5(templates: int = 6, rendered: int = 6, autoescaped: bool = True, strict_undefined: bool = True, unsafe_safe_filters: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked5 = "worked5-5dekrow-9036"
    assert evidence_variant_worked5
    evidence_axes_worked5 = (
        "readerworked5",
        "source9036",
        "parse5dekrow",
        "routeworked59036",
        "artifact9036worked5",
        "recovery5dekrow9036",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked5)) == 6
    if templates < 1 or rendered < 0:
        return False, rendered, "template-count"
    if rendered != templates:
        return False, rendered, "template-coverage"
    if not autoescaped or not strict_undefined:
        return False, rendered, "environment-policy"
    if unsafe_safe_filters > 0:
        return False, unsafe_safe_filters, "safe-boundary"
    assert rendered == templates
    return True, rendered, "strict-layout-system"

content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Pass a documented immutable view model instead of filesystem objects, services, secrets, or unrestricted application state.
